_comment: Phase 5.1 — manual movement_pattern overrides for ambiguous / multi-pattern lifts the deterministic classifier (packages/db/scripts/classify-movement.ts) can't infer from a single primary muscle. Keyed by free-exercise-db id; the value REPLACES the classifier output entirely. Reviewed by hand. Olympic lifts and thrusters are genuinely multi-pattern; the injury map (packages/ai/injury-exclusions.ts) still name-nets these independently, so an override that under-tags never widens an injured client's pool.
